nodes.label: MIDI Event In
nodes.description: Incoming MIDI event (noteOn, noteOff, CC, pitchbend, aftertouch)

nodes.label: MPE Enabled?
nodes.description: Branches on the global MPE enabled state (mpeEnabled boolean, set by MPEData::Listener callback)

nodes.label: Channel == channelNumber?
nodes.description: Compares event channel to the selected channel number. Mismatches are ignored.

nodes.label: Channel in mpeRange?
nodes.description: Checks the mpeRange bitmask for the event channel. Channels outside the range are ignored. Channel 1 is always allowed (after parameter change).

nodes.label: Ignore Event
nodes.description: Event is marked with ignoreEvent(true) and will not be processed downstream

nodes.label: Pass Event
nodes.description: Event passes through unchanged (no remapping or transformation)

nodes.label: Channel Number
nodes.description: MIDI channel to pass (1-16), active when MPE is disabled

nodes.label: MPE Start Channel
nodes.description: Start of the MPE channel range (2-16), active when MPE is enabled

nodes.label: MPE End Channel
nodes.description: End of the MPE channel range (2-16), active when MPE is enabled

nodes.label: Global MPE State
nodes.description: System-wide MPE enabled flag from MidiControllerAutomationHandler::MPEData
